plugin-speedtest.name: Speedtest
plugin-speedtest.description: Minimal internet speed test with selectable servers, latency, download-first flow, and a circular gauge.

debugMode.label: Debug mode
debugMode.description: Show Speedtest debug details for troubleshooting server behavior and measurement output.

naturalLanguage.label: Natural language
naturalLanguage.description: Allow this command to run when your query matches one of its phrases.
